# What Is a Bankruptcy Mill? -- Warning Signs [2026]
> What is a bankruptcy mill? Learn the warning signs, fee red flags, and how to protect yourself from high-volume bankruptcy firms. 2026 d...

## About
bankruptcymill.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Bankruptcy Mill Statistics: https://bankruptcymill.com/by-the-numbers.html
- What a Failed Bankruptcy Case Really Costs -- Bankruptcy Mill: https://bankruptcymill.com/cost-of-failure.html
- Why Nobody Stops Bankruptcy Mills: https://bankruptcymill.com/enforcement-gap.html
- What Is a Bankruptcy Mill? -- Warning Signs: https://bankruptcymill.com/
- Protect Yourself from a Bankruptcy Mill: https://bankruptcymill.com/protect-yourself.html
- Bankruptcy Attorney Red Flags: Detailed Checklist -- Bankruptcy Mill: https://bankruptcymill.com/red-flags.html
- How Bankruptcy Mills Make Money: https://bankruptcymill.com/the-exposed-model.html
- Hired a Bankruptcy Mill? What to Do Now: https://bankruptcymill.com/what-to-do.html

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
